productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Navy Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed spread collar, half buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on the left chest and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis easy-to-wear T-shirt from united colors of benetton is an off-duty essential. You can never have enough colours in this classic polo style. However, this versatile yet basic piece can be worn with semi-formal ensembles or with beach wear. Style this polo T-shirt under a close neck sweater with the collar tucked in, add a pencil skirt and closed toe pumps to your ensemble for an almost formal vibe. For the beach, you can wear this piece with checked tonal shorts and flip flops. We needn't tell you how you can wear this for casual coffee dates - just slip into your favourite jeans and this tee!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
